heading: Appropriation to carry out treaties
label: 153 Appropriation to carry out treaties
text: All sums that are or may be required to be paid, and all moneys that are or may be required to be invested by the treaties mentioned in are appropriated in conformity to them, and shall be drawn from the Treasury as other public moneys are drawn therefrom, under such instructions as may from time to time be given by the President.section 152 of this title
notes: CodificationR.S. § 2094 derived from , .act Jan. 9, 1837, ch. 1, § 25 Stat. 135
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 2094 derived from , .act Jan. 9, 1837, ch. 1, § 25 Stat. 135
